title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: A podcast episode exploring economic questions about AGI including tax policy, wealth redistribution, and whether inequality must rise as AI improves. The core thesis examines whether AI's productivity gains might paradoxically shrink capital's economic share due to abundance dynamics.
